siteFooter.description: Mail-in repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with free estimates, human-reviewed quotes, tracked repair progress, and secure return shipping.

home.metaTitle: Repair Center — Premium Mail-In Phone, Tablet & Laptop Repair
home.metaDescription: Mail-in repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with free photo estimates, human review, tracked progress, and secure return shipping.
home.heroTitle: Mail-in device repair you can trust.
home.heroDescription: Repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with a simple estimate process, clear approval steps, and tracked return shipping.
home.devicesIntro: Send in your device — phones, laptops, and tablets — and we will diagnose, repair, and ship it back to you.
home.commonRepairsIntro: Most repairs fall into a handful of categories. Get a price estimate in minutes.
home.deviceCardPhonesText: Screen repairs, batteries, charging ports, cameras, and common hardware issues.
home.deviceCardLaptopsText: Battery service, keyboards, storage upgrades, software recovery, and select hardware repairs.
home.deviceCardTabletsText: Glass and screen repairs, batteries, charging ports, and other common tablet repairs.
home.deviceCardDesktopsText: Handled case by case when the repair and shipping make sense for a mail-in service.
home.repairScreenText: Cracked glass, dead pixels, or touch issues repaired with quality replacement parts.
home.repairBatteryText: Weak, swollen, or fast-draining batteries replaced to restore reliable daily use.
home.repairChargingText: Loose, damaged, or inconsistent charging ports repaired so your device powers properly again.
home.repairKeyboardText: Stuck, damaged, or unresponsive laptop keys repaired with compatible replacement parts.
home.repairSsdText: Upgrade storage for faster performance, more space, and smoother everyday use.
home.repairSoftwareText: Help for devices that will not boot, run poorly, or need a clean operating system reinstall.
home.trustSafeText: Every shipment is tracked and insured so you always know where your device is.
home.trustQualityText: We use vetted replacement parts and provide a warranty on every repair we complete.
home.trustSupportText: Real people review every estimate and answer questions throughout the repair.

howItWorks.title: How mail-in repair works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from estimate to return shipping.
howItWorks.step1Text: Tell us about your device and the issue. Add photos if you can — we use them to spot extra damage before you ship.
howItWorks.step2Text: A technician reviews your request and sends a firm price. Approve when you are ready and we email shipping instructions.
howItWorks.step3Text: Pack the device using our checklist and ship it to our facility. Tracking is included.
howItWorks.step4Text: We diagnose, repair, and ship the device back. You can track every step from your phone.

estimateForm.step1Subtitle: Select the device you need repaired to get started.
estimateForm.step2Subtitle: Select your device brand and the exact model.
estimateForm.step3SubtitleGeneric: Your device — select the repair type.
estimateForm.step3NoRepairs: No repairs listed for this model — you can still submit and describe the issue.
estimateForm.step4Subtitle: Clear photos help us give a more accurate estimate. Up to 6 images.
estimateForm.step4NotesPlaceholder: What happened? What is not working? Any other details we should know.
estimateForm.step5Title: Where should we send the estimate?
estimateForm.step5SubtitleSignedIn: Signed in as {email}. We'll email your estimate within one business day.
estimateForm.step5SubtitleAnon: No account required. We'll email you the estimate within one business day.
estimateForm.successText: We'll review your request and email you a detailed estimate, usually within one business day.
estimateForm.successStep1: We review your photos and device details
estimateForm.successStep2: We send you a detailed estimate by email
estimateForm.successStep3: You approve and mail your device to us

errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with at least 10 digits.

tracking.title: Track your repair
tracking.subtitle: Enter the tracking ID we emailed you, plus the email used when submitting.
tracking.notFound: We couldn't find a repair with that ID and email.
tracking.estimateReadyText: Review the price and turnaround on the estimate page.
tracking.mailInText: Print your shipping instructions and pack your device.
tracking.messagePlaceholder: Write a message to the repair team…

estimateReview.title: Your repair estimate
estimateReview.subtitle: Review the details below. Approve to start the repair or decline to receive your device back.
estimateReview.verifyEmail: Confirm your email to view this estimate.
estimateReview.manualPaymentSubtitle: Use one of the options below to send your deposit. Once we confirm payment, we'll start the repair.
estimateReview.approvedText: Thanks for approving! Check your email for next steps.
estimateReview.declinedText: We understand. Your device will be returned to you.

mailIn.title: Mail-in instructions
mailIn.subtitle: Follow the steps below to send us your device safely.
mailIn.verifyEmail: Confirm your email to view instructions.
mailIn.checklist1: Back up any data you can't afford to lose.
mailIn.checklist2: Sign out of Find My / device-tracking accounts.
mailIn.checklist3: Remove SIM cards, memory cards, and cases.
mailIn.checklist4: Pack the device in a padded box with bubble wrap.
mailIn.checklist5: Include a note with your tracking ID inside.
mailIn.depositText: Your inspection deposit of {amount} is due before we begin the repair.
mailIn.depositManual: Send your deposit using the payment options shown below.

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.subtitle: Pick a time and we'll confirm by email.
booking.description: What's going on with the device?
booking.successText: We'll email you a confirmation shortly.

errors.required: Please fill out the required fields.
errors.futureDate: Please choose a date in the future.
errors.submitFailed: We couldn't submit your request. Please try again.

shopLanding.subtitleSimple: Fast, friendly repair service for phones, laptops, and tablets.
shopLanding.ctaEstimateDescription: Tell us about your device and we'll send a price within 1 business day.
shopLanding.ctaTrackDescription: Already have a tracking ID? Check progress here.
shopLanding.ctaBookDescription: Prefer to bring it in? Reserve a time that works for you.
shopLanding.ctaAccountDescription: See all your repairs and appointments in one place.
shopLanding.step1Text: Mail it in or drop it off — we'll diagnose and quote within 1 business day.
shopLanding.step2Text: We send a firm price by email. You approve before any work begins.
shopLanding.step3Text: Skilled technicians use quality parts and document every step.
shopLanding.step4Text: We ship it back (or call you for pickup) when it's fully tested and ready.
